=== basic
# Short list, cursor at top. Window sized to fit all items exactly.
widget: listbox
title: ListBox
width: 20
height: 7
items: Alpha
items: Beta
items: Gamma
===
╔═ ListBox ════════╗
║ ► Alpha          ║
║   Beta           ║
║   Gamma          ║
║                  ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== cursor_mid
# Cursor on middle item — that item should be highlighted.
widget: listbox
title: ListBox
width: 20
height: 7
cursor: 1
items: Alpha
items: Beta
items: Gamma
===
╔═ ListBox ════════╗
║   Alpha          ║
║ ► Beta           ║
║   Gamma          ║
║                  ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== cursor_last
# Cursor on last item.
widget: listbox
title: ListBox
width: 20
height: 7
cursor: 2
items: Alpha
items: Beta
items: Gamma
===
╔═ ListBox ════════╗
║   Alpha          ║
║   Beta           ║
║ ► Gamma          ║
║                  ║
║                  ║
╚══════════════════╝

=== with_tags
# Items with tags shown on the right.
widget: listbox
title: ListBox
width: 24
height: 7
items: alpha.js
items: beta.js
items: gamma.js
tags: [active]
tags:
tags: [active]
===
╔═ ListBox ════════════╗
║ ► alpha.js  [active] ║
║   beta.js            ║
║   gamma.js  [active] ║
║                      ║
║                      ║
╚══════════════════════╝

=== overflow_scrollbar
# 14 items exceeds MaxListVisible(12) so window gives listbox height=12 and
# a scrollbar appears (14 > 12). Cursor at top shows first 12 items.
widget: listbox
title: ListBox
width: 22
height: 14
cursor: 0
items: Item 01
items: Item 02
items: Item 03
items: Item 04
items: Item 05
items: Item 06
items: Item 07
items: Item 08
items: Item 09
items: Item 10
items: Item 11
items: Item 12
items: Item 13
items: Item 14
===
╔═ ListBox ══════════╗
║ ► Item 01         █║
║   Item 02         █║
║   Item 03         █║
║   Item 04         █║
║   Item 05         █║
║   Item 06         █║
║   Item 07         █║
║   Item 08         █║
║   Item 09         █║
║   Item 10         █║
║   Item 11         ░║
║   Item 12         ░║
╚════════════════════╝

=== overflow_scrolled_to_bottom
# Same 14-item list with cursor at last item — view scrolls down, thumb at bottom.
widget: listbox
title: ListBox
width: 22
height: 14
cursor: 13
items: Item 01
items: Item 02
items: Item 03
items: Item 04
items: Item 05
items: Item 06
items: Item 07
items: Item 08
items: Item 09
items: Item 10
items: Item 11
items: Item 12
items: Item 13
items: Item 14
===
╔═ ListBox ══════════╗
║   Item 03         ░║
║   Item 04         ░║
║   Item 05         █║
║   Item 06         █║
║   Item 07         █║
║   Item 08         █║
║   Item 09         █║
║   Item 10         █║
║   Item 11         █║
║   Item 12         █║
║   Item 13         █║
║ ► Item 14         █║
╚════════════════════╝
